g.text: Historical Permission Notice and Disclaimer - University of California variant
spdx:Historical Permission Notice and Disclaimer - University of California variant
This license is similar to HPND but omits the obligation that the copyright
notice and this permission notice appear in supporting documentation.
A license is allowed if Fedora determines that the license is a free software /
open source license. At a high level, the inquiry involves determining whether
the license provides software freedom, and (equivalently) making sure that the
license does not place burdens on users' exercise of its permissions that are
inconsistent with evolving community norms and traditions around what is
acceptable in a free software / open source license. See below for more on the
Historical Permission Notice and Disclaimer University of California variant
scancode:Historical Permission Notice and Disclaimer University of California variant
